Description: Alternative field name for the discount amount. Accepted as fallback for obdiscAmt.
How it works: Code reads: discount.obdiscAmt || discount.amt. If obdiscAmt is not provided, amt is used instead.

Description: Promotion line ID used to identify a specific discount instance.
How it works: Code reads: discount.promotionLineId || discount.discountinstance. Used to match discount instances across calls and to retain OB discount percentages.

Description: Alternative field name for promotionLineId. Identifies a specific discount instance.

How it works: Code reads: discount.applyMethod || baseDiscount.obdiscApplicationmethod. If not sent, the base discount's method is used.

Mandatory: Yes — mapped directly to discountinstance without fallback
Description: Promotion line ID for manual discounts. Mapped to discountinstance internally.
How it works: Code maps: discountinstance: m.promotionLineId. Used to identify the specific instance of the discount.

Mandatory: Yes — mapped directly to discountinstance without fallback
Description: Promotion line ID for by-total discounts. Mapped to discountinstance internally.
How it works: Code maps: discountinstance: m.promotionLineId. Used to identify the specific instance of the discount.

Risk: None — optional but has destructive side-effect if omitted
Mandatory: No — defaults to falsy (which triggers removal of auto-promotions)
Description: Controls whether other automatic discounts coexist with this by-total discount. If true, the discount is additive. If false/omitted, all automatic promotions are removed from the ticket before applying this one (removeAutoPromotionsFromReceipt).
How it works: cdiscUtils.js L67 passes it to rule.applyNext. Then promotion-by-total-utils.js checks: if (!discountRule.get('applyNext')) removeAutoPromotionsFromReceipt(receipt). Unlike manualPromotions where applyNext is hardcoded to true, here the integrator controls it.

Mandatory: No — passed to rule but not validated
Description: Indicates whether multiple instances of this discount are allowed.
How it works: Read in cdiscUtils.js when building the promotionToApply rule object: obdiscAllowmultipleinstan: bytotalManualPromotion.obdiscAllowmultipleinstan.

Risk: Low — already in request schema but missing from response
Mandatory: No — used for duplicate filtering only
Description: Search key of the by-total discount. Used to filter duplicates.
How it works: Used in generateOBDiscounts() to filter: !manualPromotions.some(p => p.searchKey === m.searchKey). Present in request schema but MISSING from response schema.
